name.description: The logical/business name of the locator used in tests.

selector.description: The primary CSS or XPath selector.

description.description: A human-readable description of what the element is.

ocrText.description: Expected text content for OCR-based healing.

lastHealed.description: Timestamp of the last successful healing event.

confidence.description: The reliability score of the current selector (0 to 1).
